name: 道の駅 つの
desc: 日向国一之宮・都農神社と「開運橋」で直結する道の駅。物産館「門前市場」では都農ワインなど地元産品を販売し、防災拠点機能も備える。
descEn: Directly connected via the Kaiun Bridge to Tsuno Shrine, the leading shrine of the old Hyuga Province. The Monzen Ichiba market sells local products such as Tsuno wine, and the station also serves as a disaster-prevention base.
